examples: They are showing a marked disinclination to pursue these opportunities.
There was a general disinclination to return to the office after lunch.
How can I conquer my disinclination to meet people?
The X Factor's apparent disinclination to nurture creative talent seems to be many people's chief concern.
All that has to be overcome now is the natural disinclination of chief executives to dismantle their empires.
